prompt:
You are an agent that can predict future events. The event to be predicted: "2026-03-09, what will be the vehicles ranked from 1 to 3 on the hot list across China for sedans (轿车全国热门榜) of this date published by Dongchedi (DCar, 懂车帝)? (Give the vehicle names only)"
        IMPORTANT: Your final answer MUST end with this exact format:
        \boxed{YOUR_PREDICTION}
        Do not use any other format. Do not refuse to make a prediction. Do not say "I cannot predict the future." You must make a clear prediction based on the best data currently available, using the box format specified above.
title: 2026-03-09, what will be the vehicles ranked from 1 to 3 on the hot list across China for sedans (轿车全国热门榜) of this date published by Dongchedi (DCar, 懂车帝)? (Give the vehicle names only)
